scripts.dev: npm run pruning:native && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run api:dev" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.lint: npm run ai:check && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web
scripts.pretest:e2e: cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --phase1-max-depth 8 --phase2-max-depth 10 && npm run build
scripts.ml:solver-smoke: npm run dataset:solver && python -m ml.train_value_baseline --dataset datasets/generated/solver-training.jsonl --epochs 1 --seed 0 --output ml/outputs/solver-value-baseline --inference-repeats 1
scripts.product:gate: npm run ai:check && cargo fmt --check && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin generate_pruning_tables -- --output crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables --phase1-max-depth 8 --phase2-max-depth 10 && npm run build && npm run lint -w @rubiks-cube-solver/web && npm run test:e2e && python -m pytest ml && python -m ml.train_value_baseline --dataset datasets/fixtures/small.jsonl --epochs 1 --seed 0 --output ml/outputs/value-baseline --inference-repeats 1 && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report && cargo run --quiet -p cube-engine --bin solver_quality_report -- --hybrid-value-outputs ml/outputs/value-baseline/value_outputs.tsv && npm run solver:real-scrambles:gate
scripts.roadmap:run:long: ROADRUNNER_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_VERIFY_TIMEOUT_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_AUTO_RESTART_IDLE_MS=0 ROADRUNNER_MAX_AUTO_RESTARTS_PER_STEP=0 roadrunner run --roadmap roadmap.md --max-steps 999
